title: McDonalds Mod
description: A mod to add McDonalds and Grimace
body:
# McDonalds!
This mod adds lots of McDonalds themed items.
![The Items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4c367b1873b2fc575ad237d68f716ddd9df4f620.png)

The items are as follows:

Big Mac

McNuggets

McFlurry

Fries

Happy Meal

Small Grimace Shake

Large Grimace Shake

## McDonalds Stores

![Your Local McDonalds](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/be89870b1108decb5ab709b69db1df995f24925e.png)

These spawn rarely in your world and contain yummy food.

This is where you can find Grimace!

![Its Grimace!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7c3224d46dc8a895ebec2a6143fefc31444ba7cb_0.webp)

The mod also adds a painting of the McDonalds logo and an advancement for eating a big mac.

Enjoy!
